channel.title: Knowledge-Graph on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Knowledge-Graph on Arrans github.io

item.title: logseq/logseq
item.description: A privacy-first, open-source platform for knowledge management and collaboration. Download link: http://github.com/logseq/logseq/releases. roadmap: http://trello.com/b/8txSM12G/roadmap

item.title: linkeddata/dokieli
item.description: 💡 dokieli is a clientside editor for decentralised article publishing, annotations and social interactions
